news.headline: EpicentRx's AdAPT-001 for Soft Tissue Sarcoma gets FDA Fast Track Designation. Includes TGFβ inhibitor and anti-PD-1.
news.summary: Today, EpicentRx, a company based in La Jolla, California, revealed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration has granted Fast Track designation for AdAPT-001, a treatment that combines an oncolytic adenovirus-delivered TGFβ inhibitor with nivolumab, an anti-PD-1 drug. This designation will expedite the development and review process for this novel therapy aimed at treating cancer. This marks a significant step forward in the fight against cancer, potentially benefiting a large number of patients.

news.headline: Global synthetic biology market is projected to reach $61.6B by 2029 with a 26.1% CAGR. Various sectors benefit from advancements like DNA sequencing and gene editing. Factors driving growth include applications in healthcare, agriculture, investment in R&D, reduced DNA sequencing costs, and continuous innovations in technologies like CRISPR-Cas9.
news.summary: The latest BCC Research study on Synthetic Biology projects a growth in demand from $19.3 billion in 2024 to $61.6 billion by 2029, showcasing a CAGR of 26.1%. The report analyzes core products like oligonucleotides, synthetic genes, and BioBrick parts, along with enabling technologies such as DNA sequencing and gene editing. It delves into various sectors like healthcare, industrial chemicals, and agriculture, forecasting market trends up to 2029 across regions like North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, and the Rest of the World. Synthetic biology innovations are transforming industries by creating designer organisms for improved product development, while factors like diverse applications, increased R&D funding, declining sequencing costs, and continuous innovations are driving this global market boom.

news.headline: BoE’s Greene: The UK may have to choose between the US and the EU.
J.Crew Group appoints Julia Collier as Chief Marketing Officer, bringing deep experience in innovative marketing strategies.
news.summary: Today, J.Crew Group revealed that Julia Collier, a seasoned retail and fashion marketing executive, has joined the company. With a diverse background, Collier is known for her expertise in implementing cutting-edge, culturally significant marketing tactics. This announcement was made on December 5, 2024, solidifying her position at Senior Vice President within the organization.

news.headline: Sui surges 20%, total value locked hits $1.68 billion, likened to Solana. SUI price: $4.23, Market Cap: $12.4 billion.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency Sui (SUI) has experienced a significant surge, with a 20% increase in a single day, contributing to a remarkable 112.9% rise over the past month. Traders are drawing parallels between Sui's current performance and the early stages of Solana (SOL). SUI's total value locked has reached a record high of $1.68 billion as of December 5th, solidifying its position as one of the most promising projects in the cryptocurrency sector. The current price of SUI is $4.23, with a market cap of $12.4 billion, showing an 18.4% increase in the last 24 hours and a 22.7% increase over the past week. In comparison, SOL is priced at $238.95 with a market cap of $113.6 billion, showing a 5.1% increase in the last 24 hours and a 1.4% increase over the past week. Additionally, Polkadot (DOT) is priced at $11.07 with a market cap of $16.9 billion, indicating a 5.3% increase in the last 24 hours and a notable 36.3% increase over the past week. Traders are closely monitoring these developments for potential investment opportunities.

news.headline: CommunityWFM earns second Great Place to Work certification with 100% employee satisfaction, 43 points above US average.
news.summary: In Richardson, Texas, CommunityWFM, renowned for its contact center workforce management software solutions, has been Certified™ by Great Place To Work®. This recognition is solely determined by feedback from current employees, with an impressive 100% of them affirming that it is indeed a Great Place To Work. This score surpasses the U.S. company average by 43 points. Great Place To Work® is a leading international organization specializing in workplace culture and employee satisfaction.

news.headline: Dechert LLP appoints 13 new partners, larger group than last year, across seven practices and six offices.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 5, 2024, Dechert LLP revealed that a total of 13 attorneys are set to become part of the firm's worldwide partnership starting from January 1, 2025. This year's group surpasses the size of the 2023 cohort, with members spanning across seven distinct areas of the firm's global operations and operating out of six office locations.

news.headline: Asia-Pacific IoT in Agriculture Market to reach $18.64 billion by 2033, was valued at $4.63 billion in 2023 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A recent report on the Asia-Pacific IoT in Agriculture Market indicates significant growth potential in the region. Valued at $4.63 billion in 2023, the market is projected to reach $18.64 billion by 2033. This growth is primarily attributed to the rising demand for enhanced productivity and efficiency in the agricultural sector. The expansion of IoT in agriculture in the Asia-Pacific region is driven by these factors and is expected to continue in the coming years.

news.headline: HireRight appoints Ranojoy Hazra as CFO and Jamie Ikerd as Chief Strategy and Transformation Officer in Nashville.
news.summary: Nashville, Tennessee - HireRight has recently appointed Ranojoy “RJ” Hazra as the new Chief Financial Officer and Jamie Ikerd as the Chief Strategy and Transformation Officer. These key appointments aim to strengthen the leadership team within the company. This move is part of HireRight’s strategic vision to enhance its financial operations and streamline its transformational efforts.

news.headline: 12 Publix leaders receive George W. Jenkins Award and President’s Award at Publix retail operations conference.
news.summary: In Lakeland, Florida, the recipients of the 2024 George W. Jenkins Award and the 2024 President’s Award were revealed at the Publix retail operations conference in Orlando. The George W. Jenkins Award, named after Publix’s founder, was given to retail and support leaders who showcased outstanding leadership qualities, upheld the Publix culture, and displayed dedication to Jenkins' values. The event honored individuals who exemplified these traits, emphasizing their commitment to excellence within the company.

news.headline: Sweet James Accident Attorneys and Steve Mehr partner with FuelFest Scottsdale to support Paul Walker's Reach Out Worldwide Foundation on Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona on December 5th, 2024, Sweet James Accident Attorneys, known for providing support and legal representation to accident victims, has revealed its collaboration with FuelFest Scottsdale. The partnership designates Sweet James as the official accident attorney for FuelFest, solidifying their commitment to assisting those affected by accidents.

news.headline: Bitcoin could reach $200,000 by 2025 due to strong institutional demand, with 683,000 BTC purchased in 2024.
news.summary: Bitcoin (NASDAQ: BTC) has the potential to reach a promising $200,000 by the conclusion of 2025, as forecasted by Geoffrey Kendrick from Standard Chartered. This surge is attributed to the increasing institutional investment and mainstream acceptance by traditional financial organizations. Kendrick emphasized the significant institutional interest that has led Bitcoin to surpass the $100,000 milestone this year, with projections indicating even greater growth in the upcoming years.Institutional inflows have been a key driver, with net purchases totaling 683,000 BTC year-to-date in 2024. Kendrick anticipates these inflows to maintain or exceed this pace in 2025, fueled by regulatory shifts and growing market participation. This information was shared in a note to Benzinga. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Join us at 13:00 PM EST for today's market digest with Jeffrey.
Liberty Latin America promotes giving back: 850 employees in 22 countries volunteered 8,900 hours during annual Mission Week.
news.summary: In Denver, Colorado, Liberty Latin America Ltd. (NASDAQ: LILA and LILAK, OTC Link: LILAB) urged its employees in 22 countries to participate in Mission Week, a volunteer initiative. Over 850 employees volunteered during the week of November 11-15, collectively contributing more than 8,900 hours to local communities. This yearly initiative by Liberty Latin America demonstrates the company's increasing dedication to giving back, with employees and partners actively engaged in charitable activities.

news.headline: South Africa urged to address issues hindering growth, says business group.
news.summary: Last week, the global market experienced a significant drop in trading with a reported 3.5% decrease in overall stock prices. This decline was attributed to the ongoing trade tensions between the United States and China, causing investors to feel uncertain about the market outlook. The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 800 points, marking one of the largest single-day drops in recent months. Additionally, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite also saw decreases of 3.3% and 3.7% respectively. Experts are closely monitoring the situation to understand the potential long-term effects of the trade conflict on the global economy.

news.headline: NVIDIA to open R&D center in Vietnam, boosting AI development. Shows confidence in country's future.
news.summary: On December 5th, 2024, in Santa Clara, California, NVIDIA revealed its plans to establish the inaugural research and development center in Vietnam. This move showcases the company's belief in Vietnam's promising artificial intelligence landscape, emphasizing its potential growth in this sector.

news.headline: TNL Mediagene merges, listed on NASDAQ, new board and investors, partners with WOWOW Tokyo, Taipei, Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: A media group with headquarters in Tokyo and Taipei has appointed a new board of directors and secured funding from investors. The group, TNL Mediagene, known for its innovative digital media and data services in Asia, has finalized a merger deal with undisclosed partner. The partnership was unveiled on December 5, 2024, and includes collaboration with WOWOW. This move comes as part of TNL Mediagene's strategic growth plan to enhance its presence in the digital media industry.

news.headline: Angie Stevenson named CEO of Forté Sports Medicine and Orthopedics after 22 years in healthcare management.
news.summary: In Carmel, Indiana, on December 5, 2024, it was announced that Angie Stevenson is assuming the role of Chief Executive Officer at Forté Sports Medicine and Orthopedics. Stevenson brings with her a wealth of experience, with twenty-two years of healthcare management background, including her most recent position as CEO at Indiana Hand to Shoulder Center. This new appointment marks a significant milestone in Stevenson's career as she takes the helm at Forté, a leading provider in the field.

news.headline: Trump's warning on tariffs for countries seeking to replace or diminish the dollar's role could stir global change.
news.summary: The newly elected President, Donald J. Trump, has warned of imposing tariffs on nations attempting to replace the dollar in trade or diminish its status as the global reserve currency.

news.headline: CANDID acquires UnifyCRM to strengthen its position as the top mortgage platform for enterprises.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee on December 5, 2024, CANDID, a top mortgage marketing and sales operating system, revealed its acquisition of UnifyCRM. This acquisition bolsters CANDID's standing as the premier platform for large-scale mortgage institutions. This strategic move aligns with CANDID's goal of providing a comprehensive solution for the industry.

news.headline: Daniel H. Schulman named Verizon lead director, succeeds Clarence Otis, Jr. Effective immediately. Otis served since 2019.
news.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. has announced the appointment of Daniel H. Schulman as the new lead director, succeeding Clarence Otis, Jr. Schulman, a member of the board since 2018 and the Former President and CEO of PayPal Holdings, Inc., will assume the role immediately. Otis, who has held the position since 2019, will continue to serve as an independent director. Verizon is listed on both NYSE and Nasdaq under the ticker symbol VZ, and this change in leadership comes as part of the company's ongoing strategic initiatives.

news.headline: Eesti Gaas to become AS Elenger Grupp, aligning with markets in 5 countries. No impact on customers.
news.summary: Eesti Gaas, the biggest privately-owned energy company in the Baltic-Finnish region, is set to rebrand as Elenger in Estonia to align with its operations in Finland, Poland, Latvia, Lithuania, and Germany. The company will officially change its name to AS Elenger Grupp pending entry in the Business Register. This transition will not impact customers as all existing contracts will remain valid without any changes or inconveniences.

news.headline: Watts Water Technologies in North Andover, MA, recognized as a top place to work by The Boston Globe.
news.summary: Watts Water Technologies in North Andover, Massachusetts, has been recognized as one of the top workplaces by The Boston Globe. This achievement underscores the company's commitment to providing a positive work environment for its employees. The recognition reflects feedback from employees and highlights the company's efforts to create a rewarding workplace. Watts Water Technologies' inclusion on this list showcases its dedication to fostering a supportive and engaging atmosphere for its workforce.Character count: 84

news.headline: Navigate Affordable Housing Partners awards $4.7 million in grants to nonprofits in Alabama, Connecticut, and more.
news.summary: In Birmingham, Alabama, as of December 5, 2024, Navigate Affordable Housing Partners has revealed the beneficiaries of its 2024 Navigate Gives Back Grant. This initiative will distribute a significant sum of $4.7 million in charitable donations to aid essential nonprofit organizations in various states such as Alabama and Connecticut.

news.headline: Global brands using Coupa have seen $221 billion in cost savings and margin improvements, driving record growth.
news.summary: A growing community of over 3,000 global brands is leveraging Coupa to optimize sourcing and adapt supply chain strategies. This has resulted in cost savings and margin improvements amounting to a whopping $221 billion. The success of these customers showcases the significant impact that Coupa has had on their operations.

news.headline: Traders await November jobs report to influence Fed's rate cut decision. Consensus expects a rebound to 200,000 jobs from October's 12,000.
news.summary: Traders are anticipating the November jobs data release, along with next week's inflation report, as crucial factors for the Federal Reserve's potential rate cut at its Dec. 18 meeting. Market odds stand at a 70% chance for a 25-basis-point reduction. Economists expect a significant rebound in November's nonfarm payrolls after October's low 12,000 gain due to hurricanes and strikes. Consensus estimates project November's nonfarm payroll growth at 200,000. Federal Reserve Governor Adriana Kugler suggested that October's disruptions may have led to 100,000 to 120,000 unaccounted jobs, potentially reflected in November's data. The ADP National Employment Report for November hinted at a slightly unclear private payroll picture. The full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: BoE’s Greene: There could be weak consumption for a while in the UK.
ByHeart appoints Denice Torres to Board of Directors, strengthening its mission to innovate infant nutrition.
news.summary: ByHeart, the leading infant nutrition company, has appointed Denice Torres to its Board of Directors, reinforcing its dedication to revolutionize infant nutrition. The next-generation company takes pride in welcoming Torres to the board in an effort to bring innovation to the forefront. This significant move signifies ByHeart's commitment to supporting parents and improving infant health.

news.headline: Zilla Security had a record-breaking year with unprecedented growth and industry innovation, marked by a major leadership hire.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Zilla Security unveiled their success in the field of modern identity governance and administration (Modern IGA), disclosing a momentous year characterized by remarkable progress, revolutionary advancements, and increased international presence. Achieving record-breaking numbers, the company solidified its position as a frontrunner in the industry. Additionally, Zilla Security welcomed a significant figure in the cybersecurity sector to further enhance their team.

news.headline: Nicobros International allocates $2 million for global research on nicotine pouches for smoking cessation.
news.summary: In Riga, Latvia, on December 5, 2024, Nicobros International disclosed a substantial investment of $2 million towards scientific research focusing on the effectiveness of nicotine pouches for aiding smoking cessation. This move comes on the heels of Nicobros' prosperous online retail of smokeless products.

news.headline: The Advanced Leadership Institute & CMU celebrate 2024 NELA graduates. Important numbers: 2024 cohort, Pittsburg, Dec 5.
news.summary: Pittsburgh - The 2024 National Executive Leadership Academy (NELA) boasts a graduating cohort of participants from The Advanced Leadership Institute (TALI) and Carnegie Mellon University Tepper School of Business (CMU). This year's National cohort consists of a diverse group of professionals, totaling a significant number of participants.

news.headline: Holiday season in France calls for Crémant d'Alsace, perfect for festive gatherings. Celebrate with bubbles!
news.summary: Ring in the Holiday Season with French Holiday Spirit COLMAR, France - On December 5, 2024, residents in Colmar, France, are gearing up for the festive season filled with a myriad of celebratory events. Whether hosting dinner parties, office holiday happy hours, cookie swaps, or attending thrilling cooking classes, the occasion calls for a touch of glamour. The essence of the holiday gatherings is incomplete without the fizzy charm of bubbles. To streamline your holiday shopping experience, consider grabbing a bottle that encapsulates the French cheer and festive spirits, ensuring a memorable celebration.

news.headline: AdCellerant partners with Denver Human Services for the seventh year in #BeAGiver Holiday Gift Drive, bringing joy and support.
news.summary: AdCellerant, a prominent player in digital advertising technology based in Denver, has revealed its involvement in the Denver Human Services (DHS) #BeAGiver Holiday Gift Drive for the seventh year running. This annual initiative is designed to spread cheer and assistance to those in need during the holiday season.

news.headline: LILT enhances AI model management for businesses with new tools for multilingual content. PrNewswire, Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: LILT, a prominent AI solution provider, introduced innovative tools at their Quarterly AI Day in San Francisco on December 5, 2024. These tools include the Bring-Your-Own Model, Data Labeling, and AI Video Dubbing. The company aims to streamline AI management processes, enhance multilingual AI outcomes, and facilitate seamless video translation. This initiative is in line with their commitment to improving efficiency and effectiveness in AI operations.

news.headline: Israeli Foreign Minister: There may now be an opportunity to reach a deal on the hostages in Gaza - Sky News Arabia.
Tron dominance shines as South Korea declares martial law; sees 200 KRW to 650 KRW surge in one day: analyst.
news.summary: On a recent trading day, there was significant buying activity observed in Tron, leading the cryptocurrency to soar from a low of 200 KRW to a peak of 650 KRW. This surge in price suggests that there was a noteworthy shift in investor behavior, according to an analyst.

news.headline: Cognigy recognized as pioneer in CMP Research Prism for real-time agent assist/copilot technology.
news.summary: Cognigy, a leading company in the field, has recently been recognized for its innovative technology on CMP Research Prism for real-time agent assist/copilot. The company's achievement solidifies its position as a pioneer in the industry.

news.headline: Sweet Paris is offering a chance to win a trip for two to Paris with all expenses covered, up to $20,000 for activities.
news.summary: Sweet Paris is offering a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to win a free trip for two to Paris. The prize package includes roundtrip flights, a six-night stay in a luxury hotel, and up to $20,000 to explore the rich culture and lifestyle of the City of Love. This giveaway also features a special prize tier for Sweet Passport Rewards members who visit a Sweet Paris location.

news.headline: Algolia handles 29 billion searches during Cyber Weekend 2024, a 20% increase from last year's performance.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Algolia announced that search activity linked to online holiday shopping surged by 20% compared to the previous year.

news.headline: Bitcoin price surged by 10%, reaching $60,000 due to positive market sentiment and increased investor interest.
news.summary: A recent report highlights that the global population has surpassed 7.8 billion, with around 4.6 billion people having access to the internet. This surge in digital connectivity has also led to a rise in online shopping, with e-commerce sales totaling over $4.2 trillion worldwide. Furthermore, the report indicates that social media usage has reached nearly 4.2 billion users, emphasizing the significant role platforms like Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok play in modern society. The data showcases the increasing interconnectedness of the world through digital means, shaping various aspects of human behavior and consumption patterns.

news.headline: NIH study shows cancer prevention & screening saved more lives in 5 types over 45 years. Dec 2024, BETHESDA.
news.summary: A study conducted by the National Institutes of Health analyzed the effects of cancer prevention, screening, and treatment on mortality rates. The research, which focused on the past 45 years, found that advancements in these areas have prevented more deaths from five types of cancer when combined. This data was released in Bethesda, Maryland on December 5, 2024. The study highlighted a significant reduction in mortality, emphasizing the importance of early detection and intervention. The specific numbers and percentages regarding the decrease in deaths were not disclosed in the information provided.

news.headline: Fairfax City Economic Development awards $182,642 to 20 office-based businesses to drive office space occupancy.
news.summary: Fairfax City Economic Development recently distributed $182,642 among 20 office-based businesses in Fairfax City, Virginia. The grants were awarded on December 4, 2024 by FCED.

news.headline: BoE’s Greene: There are risks to the UK around consumption and US policies.
Macron pushes back EU trade deal amid political challenges.
Orlandi, a leader in beauty and air care, to celebrate 160th anniversary in 2025. #innovation #excellence #milestone
news.summary: In 2025, Orlandi, a renowned company specializing in beauty sampling, home, and automotive air care, as well as custom filling and packaging, will be celebrating its 160th anniversary. The company, headquartered in Farmingdale, N.Y., has established itself as a leader in the industry, offering a wide range of services. Orlandi is recognized for its expertise in beauty sampling and home and auto air care, along with its custom filling and packaging solutions. The milestone of 160 years highlights the company's long-standing success and commitment to excellence in the market.

news.headline: Wrike named Leader in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Collaborative Work Management for 2nd year. Alexey Korotich, CPO at Wrike, expresses honor and pride.
news.summary: In San Diego, Wrike, the intelligent work management platform, has been declared a Leader in the 2024 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Collaborative Work Management (CWM) for the second consecutive year. Their recognition is attributed to Wrike's high performance in Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute. Alexey Korotich, Wrike's CPO, expressed their honor at being named a Leader in this quadrant again, highlighting the company's commitment to excellence in collaborative work management.

news.headline: BoE’s Greene: We cannot work out yet what direction US tariffs would push UK inflation.
BoE’s Greene: Inflation is fundamentally more persistent.
Platinum Dermatology Partners launches Aesthetics Research Committee to shape future of aesthetic dermatology.
news.summary: Dallas-based Platinum Dermatology Partners recently introduced its Aesthetics Research Committee (ARC) to spearhead strategic efforts in aesthetic medicine. The ARC, consisting of nine esteemed board-certified dermatologists, marks a significant move to enhance patient care by focusing on leading initiatives in aesthetic services, products, clinical trials, and education. This development underscores the company's commitment to becoming a frontrunner in the field.

news.headline: Australian Oilseeds announces fiscal 2024 results; headquartered in COOTAMUNDRA, Australia; fiscal year ended June 30, 2024.
news.summary: In Cootamundra, Australia on December 5, 2024, Australian Oilseeds Holdings Limited disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal year concluding on June 30, 2024. The Company, listed as NASDAQ: COOT, presented its numbers for this period.
